keyMappings:
# Insert your preferred key mappings here.
map ' Marks.activateGotoMode
map <C-j> previousTab
map <C-k> nextTab
map <C-6> visitPreviousTab
map <C-m> toggleMuteTab
map H LinkHints.activateMode action=hover
map J LinkHints.activateMode action=focus
map c LinkHints.activateMode action=copy-text
map L LinkHints.activateModeToCopyLinkUrl
map <C-h>  goBack
map <C-l> goForward
